title: Strict Typing, Nullability, and Boundary Validation · Gate Lens: Null Unknown
summary: Establish a strict type baseline without confusing static types with runtime validation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates null unknown increment in a strict type and boundary contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model null, missing, unknown, and unchecked indexed access explicitly.
Enable the language or checker strict baseline and document intentional deviations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
